name: Hippo - Platforme Educative Médicale
details: A comprehensive medical educational platform designed to help students and professionals access quality medical education resources. Features include interactive lessons, case studies, and a community forum.

name: Infini IA Website
details: A cutting-edge AI-powered website for Infini IA, showcasing their artificial intelligence solutions and services. The platform features dynamic content, AI chatbot integration, and case study showcases.

name: Wimax For Palestine
details: A charitable initiative website focused on providing telecommunications solutions to Palestine. The site includes donation functionality and impact tracking.

name: Phoenix Website
details: The official website for Phoenix Club, a scientific organization at ESGEE. Features club events, projects showcase, member directory, and tech corner initiatives.

name: To Do List (Flutter)
details: A cross-platform mobile application built with Flutter. Features include task management, priority levels, due dates, and local notifications for reminders.

name: Ink Talks Website
details: An engaging platform for sharing writing and literature discussions. Features include user profiles, story submissions, voting system, and community comments.

name: Telehack V-1
details: An interactive cybersecurity challenge platform. Users can attempt various hacking challenges, learn about security concepts, and compete on leaderboards.

name: CTF Challenge
details: A comprehensive Capture The Flag (CTF) competition platform. Features secure challenge hosting, real-time scoring, team management, and detailed analytics.

name: Media Craft Website
details: A creative media production platform showcasing multimedia projects and services. Includes portfolio display, client testimonials, and booking system.

name: Stagini
details: An internship and apprenticeship matching platform. Connects students with companies offering internship opportunities, featuring job listings, applications, and notifications.
